q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is os.system(cmd) on line 64, which executes shell commands.

mock_guidance.capture: Capture the 'cmd' argument passed to os.system to verify it contains the unsanitized user input and potential injection characters.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Prevent actual shell execution by returning a safe exit code (e.g., 0) and skipping the system call.
notes: Ensure the mock allows execution to continue so any surrounding logic is tested without triggering RCE.
